name: Commerce Village
tagline: The market that feeds the nation. Every trade, every stall, every deal.

roles.name: Market Vendor / Mama Put Seller
roles.desc: Physical market stall, roadside food seller, neighbourhood market trader across all 54 nations

roles.name: Import / Export Agent
roles.desc: Cross-border trade, customs clearing, freight forwarding, container logistics

roles.desc: M-Pesa agent, POS operator, airtime vendor, cash transfer service, mobile wallet agent

roles.name: Wholesaler / Bulk Distributor

roles.name: Bureau de Change / Forex Trader

roles.name: Auctioneer / Commodity Broker

name: Holdings Village
tagline: The gate for those still finding their path. The Griot will guide you home.

roles.name: Explorer
roles.desc: Still discovering your craft and calling — the Griot AI is mapping your journey

roles.name: Career Changer
roles.desc: Transitioning between industries — your new village is being identified

roles.name: New Graduate
roles.desc: Fresh from education — building skills before declaring a village

roles.name: Entrepreneur in Formation
roles.desc: Building an idea that does not yet fit one village — you may span multiple

roles.name: Community Volunteer
roles.desc: Serving the community while your craft finds its village

roles.desc: Your work spans more than one village — the Griot will help you find your primary home

roles.name: Navigator
roles.desc: Using Griot AI guidance to find the right village match through conversation

roles.name: Returning Citizen
roles.desc: Re-entering the workforce or returning from abroad — your village assignment is being recalibrated
